DIRECTOR.role: Final decisions, external systems, hiring/firing authority
DIRECTOR.note: The boss. All escalations end here.

ORCHESTRATOR.role: Fleet coordination, task dispatch, quality review, architecture

signx.name: SignX Intelligence
signx.mission: Bid scoring, estimation, customer intelligence, warehouse analytics

erp.name: ERP Systems
erp.mission: KeyedIn extraction, Kimco migration, cost data pipeline

ops.name: Operations
ops.mission: Infrastructure, deployments, data ops, fleet coordination

weaknesses: Large CSV/data crunching (better suited for Gemini)

strengths: Bulk data analysis (CSV, DuckDB, large datasets)
known_mistakes: Task 9: CSV work codes have NO leading zeros. Always verify format first.
Task 6: FastAPI route handlers are framework-called, not dead code.

when_to_hire: Task requires a specialist not currently online
Multiple independent tasks can run in parallel
A department has zero workers and tasks are queued
when_to_fire: Terminal has been idle for 30+ minutes with no pending work
Task is complete and no follow-up work exists
Agent is underperforming (repeated errors, slow throughput)
Cost optimization — replace expensive agent with cheaper one for simple tasks
hiring_rules.cost_hierarchy: Use cheapest agent that can do the job. Gemini for scanning, Claude for architecture. Don't send Claude to do Gemini's job.
